title: Standard Mission
description: The festive classic for any occasion

comboRules.title: 420 — Jackpot!
comboRules.text: You rolled the legendary 420! You win the round and the table crowns you its champion.
comboRules.characterComment: UNBELIEVABLE! The 420! I am officially speechless.

comboRules.title: Triple Heart
comboRules.text: Kiss the person on your left on the forehead. If they refuse, they take the challenge instead.
comboRules.characterComment: Awww. Love is definitely in the air tonight.

comboRules.title: Total Fog
comboRules.text: Everyone blows slowly together and pretends they cannot see anything for ten seconds. Complete silence.
comboRules.characterComment: Zero visibility. I cannot see a thing. Who are you people?

comboRules.title: Absolutely Prohibited
comboRules.text: Everyone admits one thing they are not supposed to do but still do anyway.
comboRules.characterComment: Triple prohibited. The table judges. The table condemns.

comboRules.title: Triple Four
comboRules.text: Invent an absurd rule that applies for the next three rounds. The group votes on whether it survives.
comboRules.characterComment: Three fours. Reality now follows your rule.

comboRules.title: Double Trouble
comboRules.text: Share a truth you did not plan to reveal tonight, or take two sips if you refuse.
comboRules.characterComment: Two times two times two. Speak or pay.

comboRules.title: The Void
comboRules.text: Absolute silence. Nobody speaks, moves or smiles for ten seconds.

comboRules.title: Triangle of Awkwardness
comboRules.text: Everyone points at the most suspicious person at the table. The person with the most votes takes a challenge.
comboRules.characterComment: Love, mystery and prohibition. A perfect triangle of chaos.

comboRules.title: Smoky Romance
comboRules.text: Say the first name of your latest crush. If you refuse, imitate someone at the table for one minute.
comboRules.characterComment: Four, heart, cloud. Romance is hovering nearby.

comboRules.title: Administrative Incident
comboRules.text: Recite the rules of the game from memory. If you get more than two details wrong, take a sip.
comboRules.characterComment: Two, prohibited, zero. Good luck with the paperwork.

comboRules.title: Four-Two Heart
comboRules.text: Say something genuinely kind to the person opposite you. No joke. Something real.

comboRules.title: Four in the Fog
comboRules.text: Describe your favourite film without saying its title or genre. The group has to guess.

comboRules.title: Forbidden Love
comboRules.text: Confess a secret attraction, real or fictional. Celebrities and characters both count.

comboRules.title: Two Hearts in the Clouds
comboRules.text: Give every person at the table one sincere compliment. Keep it quick.

comboRules.title: Zero Love Prohibited
comboRules.text: Tell the story of your worst date. If you have never had one, invent a believable disaster.

comboRules.title: Four-Four-Two
comboRules.text: The group chooses someone present for you to imitate.

comboRules.title: Double Fog
comboRules.text: Speak for thirty seconds about a subject you know nothing about while pretending to be an expert.

comboRules.title: Romantic Absolute Zero
comboRules.text: Write a love haiku in ten seconds. The group scores it out of five.

comboRules.title: Love in the Fog
comboRules.text: Mime a romantic movie scene without speaking. The group has to guess the film.

comboRules.title: Forbidden Fog
comboRules.text: Tell a completely invented rumour about yourself as if it were true. The group may ask three questions.
